headline: Zebra Technologies, Vishay Precision Group, Quantum Computing, Aramark And Other Big Stocks Moving Higher On Tuesday
summary: ZBRA, VSTS, AMBQ, VPG, BAK, PACS, LOT, EIKN, DDD, WEN, SIBN post significant gains on better-than-expected financial results and guidance. Peltz may take Wendy's private.
